content:
Private conversations, candid answersStart a private discussion, share one unguessable link, and let people respond under friendly anonymous names.
Start a discussionCreator sign in

Private by link
No directory and no search. Only people with your high-entropy link can enter.
Anonymous by default
Participants get a consistent pseudonym without sharing their name or email.
Built for discussion
Threaded replies and live updates keep thoughtful conversations easy to follow.
